prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-FOHHAM30MM-30MM-BLCK Product Type: SPORTING_GOODS Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline Ops 30mm Rifle Scope Mount ADI/ACI Ring System for Scopes Description: Flatline Ops Hitch Hiker is a durable rugged mount that attaches an ADI/ACI to your scope. Easily attaching to your scope the Hitch Hiker will give the advantages of the ADI or ACI, taking the guessing out of uphill or downhill precision for long-range shooting.

This is a simple tool for hunters to use in mountainous terrain to obtain their distance to target, corrected for gravity. Make sure to grab one of these before your next hunting trip.

PLEASE NOTE: ACI/ADI is not included. Search Terms: 30mm scope level 30 mm bubble level for rifle scope tube long range shooting competition precision shooting optics accessory hunting accessories Features: - Hitch-Hiker Mounting System Fits 30mm - Material: 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum - Finish: Black Hard Anodized - Hardward: Stainless Steel (Included) - Easily Attaches an ADI/ACI to Your Scope === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Flatline Ops 30mm Black Rifle Scope Mount Ring System

anthropic.title_differentiation: Hitch Hiker Mount, 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum, Hard Anodized, ADI ACI Compatible, Long Range Precision Shooting

openai.title_differentiation: 6061-T6 Aircraft Aluminum, Hard Anodized Black Finish, Stainless Steel Hardware, Fits ADI And ACI, Long Range Precision
